title: Sonic bath
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''sonic bath''' was a piece of equipment used for personal hygiene. This type of [[Bath/Legends|bath]] was not only cleansing, but also revitalizing and refreshing.

[[Patch Bruit]] found that while sonic baths were very useful, they could not remove the film of resinous [[Ore/Legends|ore]] dust that adhered to him while he was in the workplace.

In addition to their personal hygiene use, sonic baths were used by the [[Artisan/Legends|artisans]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Balinaka]] to help create [[Garnib crystal]]. Sonic baths were used in the final shaping of the crystal.<ref name="PoG1">''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
